Read a GraphReFly node through React's useSyncExternalStore contract.

## Import

```ts
import { useNodeValue } from "@graphrefly/ts/adapters/react";
```

## Signature

```ts
function useNodeValue(node: Node<T>): T | undefined
```

## Parameters

| Parameter | Type | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `node` | `Node<T>` | Node to observe, adapt, or connect. |

## Returns

A `T | undefined` value.

## Example

```ts
import { useNodeValue } from "@graphrefly/ts/adapters/react";
```

## Source

`packages/ts/src/adapters/react.ts`
